query: SELECT COUNT(*) as registered_users, SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as email_users, SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'oauth' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as oauth_users FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL OR openId IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as registered_users, SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'email' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as email_users, SUM(CASE WHEN loginMethod = 'oauth' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as oauth_users FROM users WHERE email IS NOT NULL OR openId IS NOT NULL;
